title: phlox albomarginata subsp. albomarginata
intro: Phlox albomarginata subsp. albomarginata is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the mountainous regions of Korea, known for its pink, white, and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions.
